compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1000e DE, Pro 600e, Pro 1000e DE Flex
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: proprietary Gavita e-series bus (RJ 4P4C controller side / RJ 6P4C fixture side)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, auto-shutdown, sunrise/sunset ramping, independent light cycles per channel, event logging
compatible_devices.notes: 2 independent channels; up to 80 single bus / 1000 repeater bus fixtures; expandable to 1200 with Gavita B200 booster; channels can run overlapping or alternating (flip-flop) 12/12 cycles; 2 independently programmable ECM outputs

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1700e LED, Pro 900e LED, CT1930e LED
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable (HGC906716 / HGC906717)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, sunrise/sunset ramping, independent light cycles per channel
compatible_devices.notes: LED adapter cable mandatory; dimming range 50-100% for LED; 2 channels allow independent LED control in two rooms; EL2 has 2 ECM outputs for auxiliary equipment

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only, no modulation; ECM1 max 16A AC1 / 1.5kW AC3; EL2 has 2 independently programmable ECM outputs — one for lights-on equipment (humidifier, CO2, AC) and one for lights-off equipment (heater); ECM1 sold separately

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via ECM1; ECM switches any AC load up to 15A; dehumidifier use case confirmed by Gavita ECM documentation; max 16A AC1 load

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only; CO2 equipment explicitly listed as a primary ECM1 use case in Gavita documentation; max 16A AC1 / 1.5kW AC3 inductive load

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only; room heater explicitly listed as a lights-off ECM1 use case in Gavita documentation; max 16A AC1 / 1.5kW AC3; ECM1 sold separately

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only via ECM1 — no speed control; EL2 Gen 2 has no built-in fan speed output; AC fan control with variable speed requires EL1F or EL2F with EFM1 module instead; ECM1 max 16A AC1
